cross_reactivity.note: 176 of 301 LIMK2 compounds also have LIMK1 data. Most top LIMK2 compounds are LIMK2-selective (delta > 0.5 log). 39 compounds overlap with ROCK2.

clinical_compounds.name: LX-7101
clinical_compounds.note: Only clinical-stage LIMK inhibitor. Phase 1 (glaucoma). Dual LIMK2/ROCK2.

key_references.title: Tetrahydro-pyrimido-indoles as selective LIMK inhibitors: synthesis, selectivity profiling and structure-activity studies
key_references.note: Source of top 3 most potent LIMK2 inhibitors (IC50 = 0.1 nM)

key_references.title: Recent advances in the rational design and development of LIM kinase inhibitors are not enough to enter clinical trials

genmol119_comparison.comparison: Top ChEMBL LIMK2 inhibitors are tetrahydro-pyrimido-indole scaffolds (7-azaindole-piperidine). genmol_119 uses a completely different scaffold (piperidine-pyridine). The best experimental LIMK2 inhibitors reach IC50 = 0.1 nM (pChEMBL 10.0). Without experimental validation, genmol_119's potency is unknown.
